title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 12 - 18: Recording Audiobooks Chapters

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs at 6-7am after pulling an all-nighter working on his audio history project. He describes recording and editing Wikipedia articles (organized by era) and free audiobook history pages from his website, with a plan to upload them to YouTube with synchronized highlighted text. He outlines a study system using these recordings on MP3 players, paired with history tests every two weeks.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: deeply committed, willing to go sleepless to finish recording and editing
wants to pair audio with highlighted text so viewers can read along
believes a structured listen-then-test cycle every two weeks is the right way to learn history without burnout

entities: Kendall and Loverbuck (website with free audio history books)
